queries.question: Which format is shared among all books?
queries.sql: SELECT Formats.name  from Book_Formats join Formats on Book_Formats.format_id = Formats.id join Books on Book_Formats.book_id = Books.id   GROUP BY Book_Formats.format_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Book_Formats.book_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Books)

queries.question: For each book, could you provide the corresponding format?
queries.sql: select books.title , formats.name from Book_Formats join Formats on Book_Formats.format_id = Formats.id join Books on Book_Formats.book_id = Books.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/entertainment/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title ?name WHERE {
  ?book_formats a :Book_Formats .
  ?formats a :Formats .
  ?book_formats p:hasFormats ?formats .
  ?books a :Book .
  ?book_formats p:hasBooks ?books .
  ?books p:title ?title .
  ?formats p:name ?name .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Which formats are associated with each book?
